arts.ttl: Orel Mangala sends defiant message after Everton issue update on horrific injury
arts.sum: The 26-year-old has played his last game for Everton after it was confirmed he would miss the rest of the season with an ACL injury

arts.ttl: Transfer news and rumours: Evan Ferguson to Everton, Kaoru Mitoma to Al-Nassr, Marco Asensio to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest transfer news and rumours, including Evan Ferguson to Everton, Kaoru Mitoma to Al-Nassr and Marco Asensio to Aston Villa.

arts.ttl: Everton captain Finnegan suffers ACL injury
arts.sum: Everton captain Megan Finnigan has an anterior cruciate ligament knee injury and is set to miss the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Knee injury to end Everton captain Finnigan's season
arts.sum: Everton captain Megan Finnigan has an anterior cruciate ligament knee injury and is set to miss the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Everton and Tottenham handed chance to sign player – Crystal Palace also in mix for cut-price move
arts.sum: Everton, Tottenham and Crystal Palace have been linked with a host of names in the January transfer window, and all three clubs could potentially be in the chase for AC Milan’s Samuel Chukwueze. The winger scored the Italian club’s late winner against Parma at the weekend, having just recovered from a hamstring injury. arts.ttl: Soulless feature of new Everton stadium revealed with major advantage clear
arts.sum: Everton released footage from inside the away dressing room at the club's new stadium - the contrast with the comfort of the home one is striking

arts.ttl: Hull City land youngster eyed by Derby County and Everton
arts.sum: Hull City have signed defender Cathal McCarthy from UCD, as per reporter Pete O’Rourke on X. Hull City… The post Hull City land youngster eyed by Derby County and Everton appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Leicester City rival AC Milan and Juventus for winger transfer but price-tag appears steep
arts.sum: City manager Ruud van Nistelrooy has suggested he would like a new wide-man this month to help the club negotiate the injury absence of Abdul Fatawu. Leicester City have been linked with a move for Wolfsburg winger Patrick Wimmer but a price-tag of €20m (£16.7m) likely ends their pursuit before it’s started.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy makes Leicester City 'last second' transfer vow as exit explained
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy insists permanent and loan deals remain on the table for Leicester City, who will be working until the "last second" to get deals done this January window. Van Nistelrooy said at his press conference on Thursday afternoon: “We are still working on a couple of things, we know it’s the deadline and what we’re working towards.

arts.ttl: Friday's Transfer Talk Update: Mads Hermansen, Ruud Van Nistelrooy, Ollie Watkins
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.
